tasks.title: AR_036: Regenerar schema.sql completo para refletir migrations 0056-0061
tasks.description: Regenerar Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql usando 'python scripts/ssot/gen_docs_ssot.py --schema' para incluir colunas points_per_draw e points_per_loss na tabela competitions (migration 0056 já aplicada via AR_061). AR_061 regenerou apenas alembic_state.txt (--alembic), causando dessincronia. Esta task restaura consistência entre alembic_state.txt (head=0061) e schema.sql (deve refletir estrutura atual do banco com migrations 0056-0061 aplicadas).
tasks.criteria: 1) schema.sql regenerado com sucesso (exit_code=0). 2) schema.sql contém 'points_per_draw integer' na definição de CREATE TABLE public.competitions. 3) schema.sql contém 'points_per_loss integer' na definição de CREATE TABLE public.competitions. 4) schema.sql contém DEFAULT 1 para points_per_draw. 5) schema.sql contém DEFAULT 0 para points_per_loss. 6) Após regeneração, executar hb report 036 para validar AR_036 (migration file content check).
tasks.validation_command: python -c "import pathlib; s=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql'); assert s.exists(),'FAIL: schema.sql missing'; c=s.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'points_per_draw' in c,'FAIL: schema.sql missing points_per_draw column'; assert 'points_per_loss' in c,'FAIL: schema.sql missing points_per_loss column'; assert 'DEFAULT 1' in c or 'default 1' in c.lower(),'FAIL: points_per_draw DEFAULT missing'; print('PASS: schema.sql regenerated with migrations 0056-0061 applied')"
tasks.rollback_plan: git checkout -- "Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql" "Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/manifest.json" (restaurar SSOTs para estado pré-regeneração)
